retrieved_result: Use a 'Visible' Column in Formulas to Ignore Hidden Rows in Filtered Tables - Home > Formulas, Data, & VBA > Managing Data. Article by Charley Kyd, MB
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Excel formulas for ignoring hidden rows, not debugging API integrations or API debugging techniques.
combined_text_for_llm: Use a 'Visible' Column in Formulas to Ignore Hidden Rows in Filtered Tables "Home > Formulas, Data, & VBA >Managing Data Use a 'Visible' Column in Formulas to Ignore Hidden Rows in Filtered Tables Although Excel provides two worksheet functions that ignore filtered rows in a Table, nearly any function can ignore those hidden rows if you use this new trick.by Charley Kyd, MB
